title: melicope trichantha
intro: Melicope trichantha, also known as the New Caledonian melicope, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, which is native to New Caledonia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Melicope trichantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. Melicope trichantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
